# plistAtPath

Provides the contents of a given plist file.

## Declaration

```swift
plistAtPath(filePath)
```

## Parameters

- **filePath**: String with the path of the desired file.

## Return Value

A dictionary (associative array) with the contents of the identified plist file.

## Accessing Files

- **fileExistsAtPath**: Indicates whether the given path identifies an existent file.
- **bundleAtPath**: Provides the contents of the info plist file of the identified bundle.
